message:
chore(beads): sync agent coordination state for in-progress fuzz/proptest work

Routine beads sync reflecting coordination updates from sibling coding
agents (cod_1, cod_2, cod_3) picking up three fuzz/proptest issues that
were previously "open":

- beads_rust-24a3 (markdown_import fuzz harness) -> cod_2, in_progress
- beads_rust-3kpc (shared ByteCursor across 4 fuzz targets) -> cod_3,
  in_progress, with degraded-coordination comment listing touched files
- beads_rust-rala (JSONL round-trip proptest) -> cod_1, in_progress,
  with degraded-coordination comment on tests/proptest_jsonl_roundtrip.rs

No source changes; just `br sync --flush-only` output capturing the
assignee/status transitions plus the two new coordination comments. Keeps
the on-disk JSONL aligned with the sqlite store so later agents see the
right `br ready` results.
